description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a combination of white and wood-textured wall panels, with large windows providing ample natural light to the interior. The upper floor includes a spacious balcony with glass railings and potted plants, overlooking a private outdoor patio area below. The ground floor has multiple entry points, including a main door and sliding glass doors, and is partially enclosed by a low stone wall and a pergola-covered seating area. A car is parked adjacent to the house, indicating a driveway or garage access. The overall design emphasizes open living spaces, outdoor connectivity, and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roof, wood and white exterior, large windows, and spacious balconies. Features include a private patio, glass railings, and a driveway with a parked car.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with wood paneling on the upper floor, large windows, and a car parked beside the house.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the balcony, interior living spaces, and the outdoor patio area with greenery and seating.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the extensive glass doors, balcony, patio, and the low stone wall enclosing the outdoor area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, car, and the continuation of the balcony and patio features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple modern door, no porch, and is complemented by large windows and minimal decorative elements.
